responseMessageContents.text:
## Goal
- Fix Android reels crash, update app icon with IVX logo, rebuild APK, and complete full landing page QA with real evidence (not yet certified)

## Constraints & Preferences
- Store ALL timestamps in UTC only; convert to local only for display
- Owner account must NEVER sign in automatically — manual email + password required on every launch
- App colors must match landing page — `#FFD700` gold, `#00C48C` green, `#FF4D4D` red, `#4A90D9` blue
- Do not change Android package name (`com.ivxholdings.app`) or iOS bundle identifier
- Do not create new project, replace IVX, reset repo, switch to localhost, or add Rork dependencies
- Birthday field REQUIRED (MM/DD/YYYY, age 18-120, stored as `dateOfBirth` ISO YYYY-MM-DD)
- Gender field REQUIRED — chip selector: Male / Female / Prefer not to say
- Landing QA: do not mark production ready because routes return 200; require live evidence
- Do not write COMPLETE, CERTIFIED, VERIFIED or FINAL until every required QA item passes
- If real-device test cannot be performed, report: BLOCKED — REAL DEVICE QA NOT EXECUTED
- Expo Go: do not create new project, do not run create-expo-app, do not remove production modules
- CORS must allow only: `https://ivxholding.com`, `https://www.ivxholding.com`, `https://chat.ivxholding.com`, approved local dev origins
- Use `bunx` not `npx` (npx not allowed in sandbox)
- Samsung keyboard fix must use `visualViewport` API, `touch-action: manipulation`, `user-select: text`, `100dvh`/`100svh` viewport units
- EAS credentials (`EXPO_TOKEN`, `EXPO_PUBLIC_EAS_PROJECT_ID`) NOT available
- App code is identical on Android and iOS — only deployment method differs
- Localtunnel URLs are temporary; user needs a more permanent download solution

## Progress
### Done
- **Owner auto-login removal FULLY DEPLOYED AND VERIFIED**: Commits `c67f8a2`, `e831c8d`, `e936eef`; 3 auto-login paths blocked in `auth-context.tsx`
- **Owner sign-in fix FULLY DEPLOYED — USER CONFIRMED WORKING**: Commit `d6dbfce` → GitHub `43be880c`
- **App color alignment DEPLOYED**: 784 hardcoded colors replaced across 104 Expo files
- **Enterprise Time Zone System DEPLOYED**: 69/69 tests pass, 17/17 API endpoints verified
- **Reels card redesigned DEPLOYED**: commit `730aa4d`
- **Chat UX fixes DEPLOYED AND E2E VERIFIED**: commit `c0470a3`, 5/5 messages OK
- **IVX Registration Redesign DEPLOYED**: `IVXAuthCard.tsx` (~1900 lines), `expo/app/auth.tsx`
- **Birthday field DEPLOYED**: Backend validation 4/4 scenarios pass
- **Gender field DEPLOYED**: `GENDER_OPTIONS` chip selector, `VALID_GENDERS` Set in backend
- **Samsung chat keyboard fix DEPLOYED AND VERIFIED LIVE on `chat.ivxholding.com`**:
  - Bundle `entry-e11d8407f1045ab2380c1af32601e346.js` deployed
  - Committed as `4573329`, pushed to GitHub as `8ce4706`
  - Created `expo/hooks/useWebKeyboard.ts`: VisualViewport API hook, `injectWebKeyboardCSS()`, `scrollInputIntoView()`
- **Android OTA crash repair DEPLOYED**: `app.config.ts` `updates.enabled: false`, `checkAutomatically: 'NEVER'`, `expo-updates` removed, `ota-error-handler.ts` created
- **Android reels crash fix COMPLETED, COMMITTED, APK REBUILT**:
  - `SafeVideo.tsx` integrated into `app/videos.tsx` — replaced `expo-av` `Video` with `SafeVideo`
  - Fixed TS error in `ota-error-handler.ts` with `@ts-ignore` for optional `expo-updates`
  - Committed as `cddce20`, pushed to origin
  - APK BUILD: `BUILD SUCCESSFUL in 1m 9s`, 79MB, SafeVideo fix embedded in bundle
  - APK link shared: `https://tough-ghosts-make.loca.lt/app-release.apk` (expired)
- **App icon update #1 COMPLETED**: User uploaded first logo, upscaled to 1024×1024, replaced all icon assets, `versionCode` 2→3, committed `80c1265`
- **App icon update #2 (FINAL) COMPLETED**: User uploaded second/final logo, same process, `versionCode` 3→4, committed `73eaaee`, pushed to origin
  - APK BUILD: `BUILD SUCCESSFUL in 2m 2s`, 79MB
  - APK link shared: `https://deep-turkeys-brake.loca.lt/app-release.apk` (expired)
  - Build required recreating fake watchman at `/tmp/fake-bin/watchman` (was lost in sandbox cleanup)
  - Prebuild required `bun install` (node_modules were missing)
- **Landing page QA code fixes COMMITTED** (`c265807`):
  - CORS: backend already uses explicit allowlist (`IVX_ALLOWED_ORIGINS` at `hono.ts:2445-2454`) — verified live
  - www redirect: `deploy-landing.mjs` already configures S3 www bucket redirect (lines 215-227), AND added runtime JS redirect guard at top of `<head>` in `index.html`
  - Lazy-load: created `ivx-portal.js` (10KB) and `ivx-invest.js` (16KB) as separate modules
  - Removed ~22KB inline portal/invest code from `index.html` (480KB → 451KB)
  - Added `_ivxLazyLoad` bridge script before `</body>` — dynamically loads modules on demand
  - Updated `build.sh` to copy lazy-load modules to deploy dir
  - Backend tests pass: 6/6 landing inspector, 3/3 web navigator
  - Live network checks: all endpoints return 200 (`/`, `/ivx-config.json`, `/api/landing-deals`, `/ivx-reels.js`, `/ivx-logo.png`)
  - Live CORS verified: `ivxholding.com` → allow, `www.ivxholding.com` → allow, `chat.ivxholding.com` → allow, `evil.com` → no origin returned

### In Progress
- **Landing page QA — NOT CERTIFIED, STILL OPEN**: 20 mandatory items from user's checklist; code fixes committed but NOT deployed to production (AWS/Render credentials unavailable)
  - Live site still serving OLD 480KB version (new 451KB version not deployed)
  - www redirect NOT active at edge layer (curl returns empty for www host header)
  - Real-device QA NOT executed (Playwright browser launch failed — missing `libnspr4.so`)
  - QA member registration BLOCKED — Supabase `over_email_send_rate_limit` (429)
  - Admin HQ member verification BLOCKED — owner credentials not in env
  - Bundle size report: landing 480KB live (451KB new), chat entry JS at `entry-e11d8407f1045ab2380c1af32601e346.js`, backend 6.6MB, APK 79MB (embedded JS 12.5MB)

### Blocked
- **AWS credentials NOT available**: Cannot deploy landing HTML to S3 or configure www redirect at edge
- **Render API credentials NOT available**: Cannot trigger backend redeploy
- **Owner credentials NOT in env**: `IVX_OWNER_EMAIL` and `IVX_OWNER_PASSWORD` not set — cannot test Admin HQ
- **Supabase email rate limit**: QA member registration blocked with `over_email_send_rate_limit`
- **Playwright browser launch failed**: Missing `libnspr4.so` shared library in sandbox
- **EAS credentials not available**: Cannot use `eas build` or `eas update`
- **www.ivxholding.com redirect NOT active at edge**: S3 www bucket redirect configured in code but not live
- **Landing HTML not redeployed to S3**: New lazy-load code not yet live
- **Real device QA NOT executed**: Requires physical Android device and desktop browser
- **Localtunnel URLs expire quickly**: User needs permanent hosting for APK distribution

## Key Decisions
- OTA crash fix: `updates.enabled: false` + `checkAutomatically: 'NEVER'`; JS-level `safelyCheckForUpdates()` via dynamic import
- `expo-updates` removed from deps: Kotlin version conflict (needs 1.9.0, RN 0.81 uses 2.1.0)
- Reels crash fix: `SafeVideo` wrapper disables poster on Android, skips HLS `.m3u8` sources on Android, gates `shouldPlay` behind `ready` state, catches `onError`, unloads on unmount
- Lazy-load strategy: Portal and invest code extracted to separate JS files, loaded on demand via `_ivxLazyLoad()` bridge; inline `onclick` handlers forward to lazy-loaded modules
- www redirect: runtime JS guard in `<head>` as immediate fix; S3 bucket redirect in `deploy-landing.mjs` as infrastructure-level fix (not yet deployed)
- Fake watchman binary (`/tmp/fake-bin/watchman`): returns synthetic JSON — unblocks Metro cold builds; was lost during sandbox cleanup and had to be recreated
- App is standalone (NOT Expo Go): `expo prebuild` + Gradle `assembleRelease` produces self-contained APK

## Next Steps
- Deploy landing page fixes to S3/production (requires AWS credentials)
- Deploy backend to Render (requires Render API key or auto-deploy from GitHub push)
- Re-test www redirect after deployment
- Re-attempt QA member registration after Supabase rate limit resets
- Verify QA member appears in Admin HQ (requires owner credentials)
- Run Playwright responsive tests on real machine (not sandbox)
- Run real Android Chrome test on `https://ivxholding.com`
- Capture section-by-section PASS/FAIL table with screenshots
- Delete or label QA test member after verification
- Re-run accessibility and performance checks after deployment
- Compile final evidence report with all required items

## Critical Context
- Git HEAD: `c265807` on `main` (landing QA fixes), pushed to origin (Rork internal)
- Previous commits: `73eaaee` (final logo), `80c1265` (first logo), `cddce20` (reels fix), `3e501cd` (OTA repair)
- Live backend commit: `8ce47064` (boot `2026-07-13T01:46:16.378Z`) — does NOT include latest landing QA fixes
- Live landing page: 480,558 bytes (OLD version without lazy-load or www redirect guard)
- New landing page (not deployed): 451,791 bytes with lazy-load bridge + www redirect guard
- Supabase URL: `https://kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb.supabase.co`
- Backend deployment marker: `ivx-owner-ai-hono-autodeploy-live`
- Backend live commit: `8ce470649b83369bf124442b6bdbdb0009f4727c`
- Current sandbox public IP: `136.66.153.202` (changes on restart)
- Fake watchman MUST be in PATH for Gradle builds: `PATH="/tmp/fake-bin:$PATH" ./gradlew assembleRelease --no-daemon`
- `expo-av` installed at `~16.0.8` — legacy video API, known Android stability issues
- Backend CORS allowlist at `hono.ts:2445-2454`: `ivxholding.com`, `www.ivxholding.com`, `chat.ivxholding.com`, localhost:8081/3000/5173, 127.0.0.1 equivalents
- Landing page sections: 15 `<section>` elements, 58 links, 19 property/deal card markers, 477 reel markers, 7 cookie banner markers, 5 forms
- Backend members count: 4 total (1 member, 0 waitlist, 0 investors, 0 buyers)

## Relevant Files
- `expo/app/videos.tsx` — reels screen, now uses `SafeVideo` (reels fix integrated)
- `expo/components/SafeVideo.tsx` — defensive video wrapper for Android stability (integrated)
- `expo/lib/ota-error-handler.ts` — `safelyCheckForUpdates()`, `@ts-ignore` for expo-updates
- `expo/app.config.ts` — version `1.3.0`, `versionCode: 4`, `updates.enabled: false`, `buildMarker: IVX_BUNDLE_2026_07_13_LOGO_FINAL`
- `expo/assets/images/icon.png` — 1024×1024 IVX logo (final version)
- `expo/assets/images/adaptive-icon.png` — Android adaptive icon (final version)
- `expo/ivxholding-landing/index.html` — landing page (451KB with lazy-load bridge + www redirect)
- `expo/ivxholding-landing/ivx-portal.js` — NEW lazy-loaded investor portal module (10KB)
- `expo/ivxholding-landing/ivx-invest.js` — NEW lazy-loaded investment funnel module (16KB)
- `expo/ivxholding-landing/build.sh` — updated to copy lazy-load modules to deploy dir
- `expo/deploy-landing.mjs` — S3 deploy script with www bucket redirect config (lines 215-227)
- `backend/hono.ts` — CORS allowlist at lines 2445-2454, `loadWebResponse()` at line 2412
- `backend/services/ivx-landing-inspector.ts` — landing page inspection utility
- `backend/services/ivx-web-navigator.ts` — web navigation/form extraction utility
- `/tmp/fake-bin/watchman` — fake watchman binary for cloud sandbox builds
- `/tmp/qa-member.txt` — saved QA member credentials (empty — registration blocked)
